story.title: Startup founders urge U.S. government not to shut off Chinese open weight AI

draft:
As a developer, I'm concerned about the potential ban on Chinese open-source AI. 
The founders of several startups are speaking out against this move, citing its impact on innovation. 
They argue that open-source AI benefits the global community, driving progress in fields like healthcare and education. 
Will a ban on Chinese open-source AI hinder US tech advancement?
#AI #opensource #techpolicy
